subcodes.first_line: O Mahdi! The companions' day hath drawn to a close and the sun hath reached the hour of setting, and the pen of 'Abdu'l-Bahá since early morn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهدی یاران روز تمام شد و آفتاب دم غروبست و خامه عبدالبهاء از بامداد تا
subcodes.subjects: @humor; jokes, @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @personal instructions
